## Summary

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the opportunity you see.

## Proposed solution

What would you like ArgentOS to do?

## Why this matters

What workflow, operator task, or user problem would this improve?

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you have considered?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or related issues.
